name: Chickpea [Soybean] Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup French dressing (I used Ayla Organics fat-free, vegan)
1 dessert apple (I just used red or golden delicious)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans well and toss in the dressing.
2. Peel and chop the apple. Wash and chop the celery into thin slices, then slice the onion.
3. Mix all ingredients together and add lemon juice to taste.
4. Arrange sliced tomatoes on top and garnish with chopped parsley.
